import sys
import torch
import inspect

sys.path.insert(0, '/opt/triposr')
from tsr.system import TSR

def main():
    model = TSR.from_pretrained(
        '/models/triposr',
        config_name='config.yaml',
        weight_name='model.ckpt',
    )
    
    print('=== TSR.render source ===')
    print(inspect.getsource(model.render))
    
    print('=== TSR.renderer class source ===')
    print(inspect.getsource(model.renderer.__class__))
    
    torch.save({'dummy': 1}, 'dummy.pt')

if __name__ == '__main__':
    main()
